'''pawusu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:roadblock|roadblock]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-w-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:roadblock|roadblock]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| pawusu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæwisith|pæwisith]] || [[word:pæwisij|pæwisij]] || [[word:pæwisish|pæwisish]] || [[word:pæwisi|pæwisi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:pawuwusuth|pawuwusuth]] || [[word:pawuwusuj|pawuwusuj]] || [[word:pawuwusush|pawuwusush]] || [[word:pawuwusu|pawuwusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:pawusuth|pawusuth]] || [[word:pawusuj|pawusuj]] || [[word:pawusush|pawusush]] || [[word:pawusu|pawusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:pawufsuth|pawufsuth]] || [[word:pawufsuj|pawufsuj]] || [[word:pawufsush|pawufsush]] || [[word:pawufsuf|pawufsuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pawusuthu|pawusuthu]] || [[word:pawusuju|pawusuju]] || [[word:pawusushu|pawusushu]] || [[word:pawusuku|pawusuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pawusuth|pawusuth]] || [[word:pawusuj|pawusuj]] || [[word:pawusush|pawusush]] || [[word:pawusu|pawusu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pawusuthul|pawusuthul]] || [[word:pawusujul|pawusujul]] || [[word:pawusushul|pawusushul]] || [[word:pawusukul|pawusukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pawusuthuthu|pawusuthuthu]] || [[word:pawusujuju|pawusujuju]] || [[word:pawusushushu|pawusushushu]] || [[word:pawusuku|pawusuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pawusuthun|pawusuthun]] || [[word:pawusujun|pawusujun]] || [[word:pawusushun|pawusushun]] || [[word:pawusukun|pawusukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pawusuthuoro|pawusuthuoro]] || [[word:pawusujuoro|pawusujuoro]] || [[word:pawusushuoro|pawusushuoro]] || [[word:pawusukuoro|pawusukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
